name: Powdertech Co., Ltd.
summary: Powdertech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells carriers for electrophotography in Japan and internationally. The company offers ferrite carrier materials for electrophotographic applications, such as copiers, printers, and multi-function printers; and iron powders for various applications, including chemical reduction, steel plate cutting, shot blasting, and powder metallurgy, as well as for disposable pocket warmer application. It also provides oxygen absorbers and oxygen sensors; and magnetic ferrite powders. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Kashiwa, Japan.
